metadata.description: Zero-dependency security scanner for AI agent ecosystems

plugins.name: repo-forensics
plugins.description: Security for the AI agent ecosystem. 18 scanners + forensify cross-agent self-inspection (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, NanoClaw). Detects prompt injection, supply chain attacks, credential exposure, MCP tool poisoning, and cross-ecosystem risk patterns. PostToolUse auto-scan hook, macOS Seatbelt sandbox, 19 correlation rules, 127 version-pinned IOCs.
